prompt: I need to add a new NFS: 'All external API calls must have a fallback mechanism to prevent system-wide failures.' This is medium priority. Also, URS-007, about 'seamless user experience', is still too vague. Can you give me more concrete examples or metrics for it?

expected.addRequirement: add a new NFS: 'All external API calls must have a fallback mechanism to prevent system-wide failures.'
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Medium for the new NFS regarding fallback mechanism for external API calls.
expected.clarifyRequirement: give more concrete examples or metrics for URS-007, 'seamless user experience'.
